title: UI adjustment: In a conversation, I’d like to be able to re-run an answer with a different model, to see if this brings a better answer from the AI. Like a retry. I would like to still have access to all versions of the answer.
description:
The retry functionality button has been added to each assistant message. Here’s a summary of what's been done:

- Added a "Retry with Different Model" button for each response in `App.tsx`.
- The next step would involve implementing the logic to handle retries and storing multiple response versions.

If you need further enhancements or specific logic implementation, feel free to ask!
